name: ExtensionTestScript_Profile
title: R5: profile additional types
description: R5: `TestScript.profile` additional types (canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestScript.profile` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestScript.profile` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `TestScript.profile` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`
*  R4B: `TestScript.profile` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`
*  R4: `TestScript.profile` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestScript.profile` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `TestScript.profile` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `TestScript.profile` do not cover the following types: canonical.
The mappings for `TestScript.profile` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
